tools.name: findCourses
tools.description: Course content for admin read-only inspection

id.description: Optional: specific document ID to retrieve. If not provided, returns all documents

fallbackLocale.description: Optional: fallback locale code to use when requested locale is not available

limit.description: Maximum number of documents to return (default: 10, max: 100)

locale.description: Optional: locale code to retrieve data in (e.g., "en", "es"). Use "all" to retrieve all locales for localized fields

sort.description: Field to sort by (e.g., "createdAt", "-updatedAt" for descending)

where.description: Optional JSON string for where clause filtering (e.g., '{"title": {"contains": "test"}}')
